title: JS Removed Crosshair
description: This Pack will remove the Crosshair of your Minecraft.
body:
# JS Removed Crosshair

This resource pack by **JS Gaming** removes the crosshair from your Minecraft HUD — simple, clean, and effective.  
It’s compatible with Minecraft versions **1.20.2 and above**.  

If you encounter any issues, feel free to join our **Discord server** for support.  

[Website](https://jumpstone4477.de)

> JS Gaming is part of [HMLabs](https://hmlabs.eu).
